text_blocks.text: Complete wiring for solar controller LOAD output . This includes the LOAD +, LOAD -, LOAD +_SW, and J+ wiring from the schematic.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Use a DMM to check the polarity of the two barrel jack connectors. The outside of the barrel jack is negative. Mark the positive wire with a piece of red tape.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Complete wiring for solar controller LOAD output . This includes the LOAD +, LOAD -, LOAD +_SW, and J+ wiring from the schematic. Use a DMM to check the polarity of the two barrel jack connectors. The outside of the barrel jack is negative. Mark the positive wire with a piece of red tape.
